description_long: This house features a steeply pitched gable roof covered with reddish-brown shingles, giving it a rustic, traditional appearance. The exterior walls are constructed from stone and timber, with visible wooden beams and a pattern of rectangular stonework. Multiple windows with white frames are symmetrically arranged along the front and sides, and a prominent stone chimney rises from the roof. The main entryway is arched and set beneath a small overhang, flanked by two windows and topped with decorative woodwork. The house sits directly on a patch of grass, with no visible foundation or steps. Overall, the structure evokes a medieval or Tudor-inspired architectural style.
description: A rustic stone and timber house with a steep gable roof, symmetrical windows, and a prominent chimney, evoking a traditional European style.
description_view_0: Front view showing symmetrical windows, timber framing, and the main facade with no visible entryway.
description_view_1: Side view featuring the arched main entryway, decorative woodwork, and the stone chimney on the roof.
description_view_2: Rear view with symmetrical windows and the chimney visible on the left side of the roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a solid wall with minimal windows and exposed timber framing.
attribute_entryway_design: Arched wooden door beneath a small overhang, flanked by windows and decorative timber framing.
